exemplar.title: How does Stephen King use literary techniques to create suspense in his book "Pet Sematary"?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Stephen King use literary techniques to create suspense in his book "Pet Sematary"?

subject.title: English B
subject.description:
**IB English B** is a **Group 2** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **language acquisition through five prescribed themes: identities, experiences, human ingenuity, social organization, and sharing the planet**, with a strong focus on **developing receptive, productive, and interactive communication skills in English as a second language**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2025**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Productive skills - writing | 1 hour | 1 hour 15 minutes | 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Receptive skills - listening and reading comprehension | 1 hour 45 minutes | 2 hours | 50% |
| **Individual Oral** | Internal assessment - oral communication | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 25% |

strengths: The topic and purpose are communicated accurately and maintained throughout, with clear section headings tied directly to the research question.
The research question is precisely stated, narrow in scope, and consistently governs the structure of the analysis.
weaknesses: Methodological rationale is only briefly sketched and lacks explicit justification for source and passage selection.
Some biographical background on King is overly extensive and not directly linked to the focus on suspense techniques.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two of the three strands (topic communication and research question clarity) clearly meet the top band, demonstrating precise focus and purpose. The methodology strand falls short of the highest descriptor due to limited rationale for source selection, placing it firmly in the 5-6 band but not at its very top. A score of 5 reflects this overall high performance with a single moderate weakness.

strengths: Terminology and literary concepts are used accurately and consistently throughout the investigation.
Primary quotations are well integrated and precisely referenced to support analytical points.
weaknesses: Engagement with secondary sources lacks depth of critical evaluation and alternative perspectives are seldom explored.
Occasional unsupported generalisations about the horror genre and reliance on plot summary in places weaken subject knowledge coherence.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates clear and coherent knowledge of the novel and applies technical vocabulary effectively, satisfying the 5â6 band for terminology. However, interaction with secondary material is only partial and some sections lean toward summary rather than critical insight, aligning the overall performance with the mid-range of the 3â4 band. A score of 4 captures this solid yet uneven execution.

strengths: The argument is coherent and persuasive, linking each literary technique back to the research question in a logical progression.
Analysis regularly moves beyond description, showing cause-and-effect relationships and drawing on varied primary and secondary sources.
weaknesses: Discussion seldom addresses counter-interpretations or methodological limitations, and the conclusion lacks evaluative reflection.
Some passages lapse into summary rather than deep interpretive analysis, and secondary sources are not critically interrogated for perspective.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands fall into the 7â9 band for good quality critical thinking. While the investigation presents a consistently relevant and well-structured argument with solid analytical depth, it stops short of the sustained sophistication and evaluative nuance required for the top band. An 8 reflects strong critical engagement with minor inconsistencies and areas for deeper evaluation.

strengths: All required structural components (title page, headings, conclusion, bibliography) are present and logically ordered.
Section headings and table of contents entries generally guide the reader effectively through the argument.
weaknesses: Page numbers are missing in the main body, hindering easy navigation.
Table of contents entries and layout show inconsistent indentation and alignment, detracting from overall polish.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The structure is clearly appropriate and complete, satisfying the higher band, but layout and pagination issues reflect only partial adherence to IB presentation requirements. A mid-band score of 3 accurately represents a coherent structure marred by inconsistent formatting.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research questionââHow does Stephen King use literary techniques to create suspense in his book Pet Sematary?ââis explicitly stated in the title page, repeated in the introduction, and clearly governs the structure of the analysis.  Each chapter heading maps directly onto an identified literary technique, signalling a tight connection between question and discussion.  The wording is sufficiently narrow (one novel, one effect, a defined set of techniques) to ensure sustained exploration rather than a broad thematic survey.  This matches the expectations of a clearly stated, focused, and effectively connected research question (band 5-6).

The analysis moves well beyond description: each literary technique is illustrated with primary quotation, examined for effect, and linked back to suspense.  The student articulates cause-and-effect relationships (e.g., how fragmented syntax mirrors panic) and weaves in secondary commentary to support claims.  Nevertheless, a few sections lapse into extended quotation or reiteration of plot, and counter-interpretations are rarely addressed.  The overall depth is strong but not consistently sophisticated, justifying a score in the 7-9 bandâs lower range.

Primary evidence is well integrated through frequent, accurately referenced quotations that underpin most analytical points.  Secondary material, while relevant, is often limited to brief parenthetical citations without deep engagement or evaluation; alternative perspectives are seldom explored.  Overall the sources chosen are appropriate and generally well applied, but the level of critical interaction remains partial rather than consistently rigorous, aligning with the 3-4 band.

The student supplies a cover page, word count, and a largely accurate table of contents, but page numbers are still missing within the body of the essay and some table entries are mis-aligned.  Citation punctuation shows minor inconsistencies.  Visual presentation is serviceable yet not fully polished, reflecting partial but incomplete adherence to IB layout requirementsâconsistent with the 1-2 band.

The essay demonstrates clear and coherent knowledge of Kingâs novel and of suspense-related literary concepts (foreshadowing, dramatic irony, narrative perspective, etc.).  Illustrative examples are accurate and usually well contextualised.  Nonetheless, occasional generalisations (e.g., broad claims about the horror genre) are unsupported, and some analytical sections (notably âSymbolismâ) rely on plot summary more than critical insight.  This reflects solid but not consistently sophisticated understanding, meeting the criteria for the 3-4 band.

All required structural componentsâtitle page, abstract-style introduction, body with logical sub-headings, conclusion, and bibliographyâare present and organised in a sequence that supports reader comprehension.  Headings match the Table of Contents and internal referencing is consistent.  Minor defects (occasional oversized blocks of text, uneven spacing) do not impede navigation.  The structure is therefore âclearly appropriate and completeâ (band 3-4).

The bibliography is varied and generally pertinent, combining primary text, monographs, journal articles, and reputable web resources.  Most sources demonstrably inform the analysis, and citations are broadly accurate, though there are occasional typographical slips.  The investigation remains closely tied to the research question throughout, but evaluation of source reliability or contrasting scholarly views is thin.  This constitutes âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ research quality, meriting placement at the lower end of the 7-9 band.

The studentâs topicâStephen Kingâs construction of suspense in Pet Semataryâis conveyed immediately in the title, reiterated in the opening paragraph, and maintained consistently in every analytical subsection.  Each section heading (foreshadowing, tone, symbolism, etc.) shows how the investigation stays focused on the announced purpose of uncovering âhowâ these techniques create suspense.  The prose is clear and the level of specificity (e.g., precise technique labels and page-referenced quotations) demonstrates that the chosen focus is wholly appropriate to English-language literary study.  Consequently, the work fulfils the descriptor for the 5-6 band.

The essay advances a coherent, largely persuasive argument that Kingâs techniques collectively engender suspense, moving logically from individual devices to a synthesised conclusion.  Reflection on implications for readers and writers adds evaluative dimension.  Still, the discussion seldom interrogates alternative readings or acknowledge methodological limitations, and some repetition slightly weakens cohesion.  These qualities correspond with a âgoodâ level of discussion and evaluation (band 7-9).

The student outlines a plausible methodâclose reading of chosen passages supported by secondary criticismâand lists the techniques to be examined.  However, the rationale for selecting particular critics, editions, or passages is asserted rather than justified, and issues such as criteria for evaluating source reliability or limitations of the method are only briefly mentioned.  The methodology is therefore largely present and functional but lacks the explicit critical justification expected for the top band, placing it solidly in the 3-4 range.

Across all chapters the student deploys literary terminologyâforeshadowing, parallelism, third-person limited narration, tone, atmosphereâwith accuracy and consistency.  Definitions are generally precise and applied directly to textual evidence, indicating confident command of discipline-specific vocabulary and concepts.  Minor lapses in phrasing do not detract from the overall assured use of technical language, fulfilling the descriptors of the highest band (5-6).

annotations.comment: The title page immediately communicates the focus on suspense in Pet Sematary, establishing a clear and appropriate purpose for the investigation in line with the research question.
The research question is prominently and precisely stated, providing a tight focus that effectively drives the structure of the analysis.
The word count is provided and falls within the 4000-word limit, demonstrating full compliance with IB formatting requirements.
The contrast between long descriptive and short action-oriented sentences is clearly articulated, showing effective linkage of form to function.
The footnote for narrative perspective appears at the end of body text rather than directly under the relevant paragraph; relocate for clarity.
The narrative perspective section heading reinforces the essayâs structure and clearly signals the analytical focus on point of view.
The discussion of third-person limited perspective effectively links narrative choice to suspense mechanics, showing nuanced critical thinking.
The internal conflict quote is well integrated, demonstrating how psychological tension contributes to narrative suspense.
The concept of dramatic irony is introduced effectively but would benefit from a concrete text example to fully evidence the claim.
The conclusion heading is distinct and signals a clear structural closure, aiding the readerâs comprehension of the essayâs end.
Analysis occasionally lapses into plot summary rather than exploring interpretive depth; ensure each discussion section links technique to effect.
The childâs speech excerpt is a well-chosen example of foreshadowing, reinforcing how character dialogue contributes to suspense.
This footnote lacks precise page locators for the extended quotation; include exact page numbers to improve traceability.
The analysis of descriptive language successfully links sensory detail to the atmosphere of menace, demonstrating analytical insight.
The symbolism subsection is clearly signposted, maintaining structural coherence and guiding the reader through thematic analysis.
Bibliography entries use mixed list styles and inconsistent indenting; align formatting with IB bibliography conventions.
The portrayal of Gageâs unnatural return is richly detailed, reinforcing the analysis of resurrection as a source of horror.
The analytical paragraph ends abruptly, suggesting a sentence or transition may be missing; ensure all sections conclude coherently.
The conclusion largely recaps earlier points without critical reflection on limitations or suggestions for further research, limiting evaluative depth.
The final reflection offers insightful evaluation of personal learning and demonstrates a high degree of engagement with the research process.
The bibliography mixes numbered and unnumbered list styles and groups primary with secondary sources inconsistently; standardize formatting per IB guidelines.
Table of contents entries show inconsistent indentation and alignment, which detracts from clear navigation of the document.
Page numbers are missing within the main body, making it difficult for readers to locate referenced sections efficiently.
The section on suspense as a concept reads like literature review rather than methodological rationale, obscuring how the research will be executed.
The clear subheading for the foreshadowing analysis supports a coherent structure and guides the reader through the technique-focused discussion.
Dialogue between Louis and Jud is aptly chosen to illustrate how character interaction deepens suspense through lore.
Some paragraphs introduce narrative techniques without immediately linking to suspense effects; tighten analysis by pairing claims with evidence.
The sensory phrase âbig cold bullet of fearâ is a vivid example of atmosphere control, illustrating clear subject knowledge.
Footnotes in the presentation of sensory details vary in style; adopt a uniform citation format for consistency.
The funeral scene analysis captures emotional stakes effectively, linking family conflict to impending horror.
The opening biographical detail on King, while informative, is overly extensive and not directly linked to suspense techniques, diluting the focus on the research question.
The introduction effectively situates the research question and student motivation, demonstrating clear understanding of the studyâs purpose and context.
Footnotes in the introduction are cited but lack critical engagement with source reliability, which would strengthen the academic rigor of the background.
Primary quotations are integrated effectively in the foreshadowing section, providing strong textual evidence for the suspense argument.
Footnote punctuation is inconsistent here; adopt a standard citation format to improve reference clarity.
The vivid description of the cemetery markers demonstrates precise engagement with the primary text and reinforces the ritualistic tension.
The methodology describes close reading and secondary research but does not justify the selection criteria for passages or sources, limiting methodological rigor.
Footnote numbering is reset in this chapter, creating confusion; maintain a continuous sequence across the essay.
Secondary sources are cited without discussion of their perspective; contrasting scholarly views would strengthen critical evaluation.
The climactic description of Louisâs visceral reaction is well integrated, showing how diction intensifies emotional tension.
The section heading for dialogue analysis is clear and consistent with the table of contents, aiding reader orientation.
Analysis of the epigraph demonstrates awareness of tone setting, though deeper linkage to specific narrative techniques is possible.
Using Rachelâs dialogue to highlight thematic tension effectively demonstrates how character voice contributes to suspense.
The quoted parallelism example vividly illustrates how sentence rhythm mirrors character panic, demonstrating strong analytical depth.
Footnote spacing and alignment here differ from other sections; apply consistent formatting rules to all citations.
Discussion of the cemetery as a symbol effectively articulates how thematic resonance underpins the suspense mechanism.
The sentence structure section is clearly signposted, ensuring smooth progression through the analysis of pacing techniques.
